jobs.name: Maintenance-Daily-Lacia
jobs.description: Daily maintenance loop for OpenClaw stack

payload.message: [AUTO][MAINTAIN] Check gateway/cron/session health; inspect last 24h failures; review mailbox backlog; if needed delegate to Satonus/Methode; APPEND ONLY (do not overwrite existing file) a new timestamped block to /home/yarizakurahime/claw/Queue.md with issue, action, next step; output DONE/BLOCKED/NEXT.

jobs.name: Github-Explore-Snowdrop
jobs.description: Daily GitHub exploration and opportunity discovery

payload.message: [AUTO][GITHUB-EXPLORE] Use github/gh-issues to scan openclaw/openclaw, openclaw/skills, CrepuscularIRIS/ClawRoom and ecosystem updates. Return top 5 findings with URL + impact + suggested action. IMPORTANT: do not edit/write any local files; output summary only.

jobs.name: PR-Cycle-Methode
jobs.description: PR preparation and controlled auto-submit workflow

payload.message: [AUTO][PR-CYCLE] Check git/gh status for /home/yarizakurahime/claw and /home/yarizakurahime/claw/ClawRoom. For no-PR branches output a DRAFT PR plan; only create draft PR when latest commit contains [auto-pr]. For open PRs inspect CI/comments and propose deterministic fixes. IMPORTANT: avoid modifying local markdown logs; output summary only.

[AUTO][CI-GUARD] Use github + security-audit to review open PR checks, failed workflows, and risky diffs. For each issue provide severity, root cause, and next owner. If safe and deterministic, suggest exact patch plan. IMPORTANT: do not edit/write local files; output summary only.
